description:
Create column Title_clean at index 8 based on column Title using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/\s*\[electronic resource\]\s*$/, "").trim()
)

Create column Author_name_clean at index 6 based on column Personal author using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/,\s*\d{4}-\d{4}\.?\s*$/, "").trim()
)
Move column Author_death_year to position 7

Create column Other_personal_authors_clean at index 18 based on column Other personal authors using expression grel:if(
  isBlank(value),
  null,
  value.replace(/\s+/, " ").trim()
)
